title: Subagent Contract
description: Platform-level schema for a subagent contract. See docs/subagent-schemas.md for full semantics, invariants, and customization boundaries.

contract_id.description: Unique identifier for the contract. Must start with 'contract-'.

task.description: What the subagent should do. Must be a concrete task statement, not a vague goal.

mode.description: Collaboration mode. Platform default is 'worker'. Other values: 'handoff', 'team', 'swarm', 'subgraph'.

scope.description: Narrow execution boundary for the subagent. Must be explicit, not broad.

allowed_artifacts.description: Artifacts (file paths) the subagent is allowed to modify or create. If empty, the subagent has no write permission to authoritative documents.

required_refs.description: Authoritative references the subagent must re-read before execution.

acceptance.description: Acceptance criteria. Each item describes a specific condition for the contract to be considered fulfilled.

verification.description: Verification steps the subagent must execute before reporting completion.

out_of_scope.description: Explicitly excluded scope items. Without this, the contract is considered insufficiently specified.

report_schema.description: Identifier for the report structure the subagent should follow when reporting results.
